description_wiki: Gibson County is a county in the southwestern part of the U.S. state of Indiana.
Pike County is a county in the southwest portion of the U.S. state of Indiana.
Fort Branch is the largest town and 2nd largest community in Gibson County, Indiana after Princeton.
World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

aliases: War to Resist US Aggression and Aid Korea
description: war between North and South Korea, 1950–1953
description_wiki: The Korean War (25 June 1950 – 27 July 1953) was an armed conflict the Korean Peninsula fought between North Korea (Democratic People's Republic of Korea; DPRK) and South Korea (Republic of Korea; ROK) and their allies.

aliases: Amateur Sports Capital of the World
description: capital city of the U.S. state of Indiana and the seat of Marion County
description_wiki: Indianapolis ( , IN-dee-ə-NAP-ə-lis), colloquially known as Indy, is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Indiana and the county seat of Marion County.

entity: United States Marine Corps Recruit Depot San Diego
surface_forms: Marine Corps recruit depot which is right inside the city limits of San Diego
description: US Marine Corps base in San Diego, California, United States
description_wiki: Marine Corps Recruit Depot San Diego (MCRD San Diego) is a United States Marine Corps military installation in San Diego, California.

surface_forms: San Diego at the train station
description: seat of San Diego County, California, United States; second-largest city in California
description_wiki: San Diego (  SAN dee-AY-goh; Spanish: [san ˈdjeɣo]) is a city on the Pacific coast of Southern California, adjacent to the Mexico–United States border.

description: US Marine Corps base near Oceanside, California, United States
description_wiki: Marine Corps Base Camp Pendleton is the major West Coast base of the United States Marine Corps and is one of the largest Marine Corps bases in the United States.

description: private university in Evansville, Indiana, United States
description_wiki: The University of Evansville (UE) is a private university in Evansville, Indiana, United States.
